items.name_cn: Dior/women's bag

items.name_en: Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Oblique"
items.name_cn:
Dior❤ 30 MONTAIGNE HOBO AVENUE Mini Bag "Oblique"
This Hobo Avenue mini bag is a new arrival from the Fall 2023 Ready-to-Wear collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a vintage charm. Crafted from blue Oblique print fabric, it comes with two detachable pouches for practical versatility. The elegant design features a leather and chain strap finished with matching enamel CD links. It can be worn on the shoulder, adding a finishing touch to various looks this season.
Front featuring matching enamel CD logo
Spacious compartment
2 detachable pouches, one with a zip closure and 3 card slots
Chain strap section finished with matching enamel CD links
Model: 2336
Size: 21×13×5cm

items.name_cn:
Dior❤ Medium Travel Nomad Clutch
This season's new clutch bag fuses multiple elements, making it a stylish statement piece. Crafted from black calfskin! It features a distinctive oversized woven quilted effect. The spacious, flexible design can hold a mobile phone and various small daily items. It is easy to carry by hand or on the shoulder, with metal rings on the sides, allowing it to be paired with a Dior embroidered shoulder strap.
Fits various iPhone models and wallets
Size: 22×13×9.5cm
Model: S5554

items.name_cn:
Dior❤️ Toujours Handbag [Medium Brown]
This Dior Toujours handbag made a stunning appearance at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from brown calfskin, it is detailed with oversized woven stitching. The spacious interior compartments with a small pocket keep daily essentials neatly organized. It features a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure and adjustable sides to elevate the style. The leather handle has adjustable details for easy carrying.
CD Lock and strap closure
DIOR charm
Removable inner pocket
Adjustable leather handle
Includes dust bag
Model: 2821
Size: 28.5x19x21.5cm

items.name_cn:
Dumpling Bag in Stock!!️
Miss Caro Wine Palm Straw Series, feels so summery. Sky blue fabric paired with creamy white calfskin. Light colors look fresh and healing. Lucky for those who love shoulder bags. Small and simple shape, paired with classic oblique fabric and vintage gold letters. Stylish and exquisite. Super lightweight for personal use, full capacity to store daily items. Comes with an adjustable leather shoulder strap, can be worn elegantly over the shoulder or carried by hand
size:24*6.5*14cm

items.name_en: Factory Grade Cashmere Lined✔️ Extra Mini Three-Compartment
items.name_cn:
Factory Grade Cashmere Lined✔️ Extra Mini Three-Compartment
The Lady's latest micro series. A tiny bag that can't hold much, only cute little things 😘. Crafted from soft lambskin with a signature letter hardware buckle and exquisite shape 👏🏻. Simple, stylish, and versatile. The capacity is small, fitting only lipstick and car keys, and can also serve as a card holder 🤗
size:12*10*5cm

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Factory Grade Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag「Black」
items.name_cn:
Factory Grade Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag「Black」
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new arrival from the Fall/Winter 2024 collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and fashionable. Crafted from calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern to elevate the style. The compartment is spacious, suitable for various daily items. It comes with a leather top handle and an adjustable, removable shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, removable leather shoulder strap
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick
